resultList.dtldesc: Experience unparalleled living in this magnificent 3,028 sq. ft penthouse, situated in the heart of Whitefield, Bangalore’s premier technology and residential hub. Offering a rare combination of expansive indoor space and stunning views, this property is the ultimate choice for those seeking a luxurious, high-altitude residence in one of the city's most dynamic and sought-after localities.::::Property Specifications::This meticulously designed penthouse spans an impressive 3,028 sq. ft, featuring an architectural layout that emphasizes grandeur and light. The residence includes three generously proportioned bedrooms, each paired with modern, high-specification bathrooms. The living and dining areas are vast and open-plan, designed to offer a seamless flow that is perfect for both refined entertaining and private relaxation. Floor-to-ceiling windows and sprawling terrace access ensure the interior is flooded with natural light while providing panoramic vistas of the surrounding cityscape. High-end finishes and superior construction quality define every corner of this unique home.::::Facilities::The penthouse is part of a premium, world-class residential development that prioritizes luxury and security. Residents benefit from comprehensive amenities, including multiple dedicated parking spaces, 24-hour power backup, and a sophisticated water management system. The building is serviced by high-speed lifts and features 24/7 security with advanced surveillance, ensuring complete peace of mind. Beyond essential infrastructure, the project offers exclusive access to top-tier amenities, such as a state-of-the-art clubhouse, a swimming pool, and well-maintained common garden spaces, all managed to the highest professional standards.::::Locality::Whitefield is a thriving and highly desirable neighbourhood in Bangalore, renowned for its status as a major global IT hub and its well-developed residential ecosystem. The locality provides a seamless blend of professional opportunity and high-quality living. Residents are surrounded by a wealth of premium social infrastructure, including elite educational institutions, world-class multi-speciality hospitals, and expansive shopping malls like Phoenix Marketcity. With its excellent connectivity to major arterial roads and proximity to the metro line, this location ensures efficient commuting to the city’s primary business corridors, making it a perfect sanctuary for those who value convenience, prestige, and a vibrant urban lifestyle.

resultList.dtldesc: Elevate your lifestyle with this stunning 3 BHK flat for sale in Puravankara Purva Skydale, Sarjapur Road, Bangalore! The living area showcases a half chimney and wooden flooring, enhancing its aesthetic appeal. ::::::The flat is Vaastu compliant and faces west, ensuring a positive energy flow. With three spacious bedrooms and four bathrooms (three attached to bedrooms and one common), this flat is designed for convenience. Two balconies, one attached to the master bedroom and the other to the living room, overlook a picturesque lake view, perfect for unwinding after a long day.::::::Facilities::::::This exceptional property is equipped with a range of modern amenities to enhance your living experience. You will have two covered car parking spaces and enjoy 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources. The building features a 100% power backup facility, ensuring comfort during outages. ::::::Safety is a priority, with a security guard on duty and CCTV cameras installed throughout the premises. The two lifts make accessing your home easy and convenient. Residents will also have access to fantastic community facilities, including a banquet hall, barbeque pit, multipurpose hall, and visitor parking.::::::Locality::::::Conveniently situated opposite Lakedew Residency Phase 2, this flat is surrounded by essential amenities that cater to your daily needs. Schools and hospitals are located nearby, making it perfect for families. Shopping is a breeze with malls and supermarkets close at hand. ::::::Public transport options, including buses and auto-rickshaws, are easily accessible, providing excellent connectivity to the city. The K R Puram railway station is 15 kilometers away, and the nearest metro station is a quick 5-minute drive.::::::This 3 BHK flat in Puravankara Purva Skydale is a rare opportunity for anyone looking to embrace modern living in a thriving area of Bangalore. Don’t miss out on this chance to make this beautiful residence your new home—contact us today to schedule a visit!

resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to your new residence at Gopalan Aqua, a stunning 2 BHK apartment available for sale in the center of Whitefield, Bangalore. The well-designed house combines the latest way of life and the tranquility of nature to create the perfect abode for families as well as professionals.::::::Property Specifications::::::This A Khata property measures a super area of 1325 sqft and is located on the first floor of a well-planned building with a total of 14 floors. The flat is semi-furnished and Vaastu compliant for the purpose of maintaining a peaceful living environment. It is North-East facing, which means plenty of sunlight and positive energy flow. The flat has two wide bedrooms, with two bathrooms (one attached and one common, both having provision for geysers).::::::A beautiful balcony with a wonderful garden view is attached to the living room. The living cum dining area is perfect for social parties, and the modular kitchen has a utility space attached to it for ease. The floor is done tastefully with vitrified tiles for the entire flat.::::::Facilities::::::Residents will have access to a range of modern amenities for comfort and convenience. The complex has covered parking, so your car is safe and secure. You'll get 24-hour water supply, 100% power backup, and a security guard present for your peace of mind. The complex has CCTVs for added security and two lifts for convenient access to all floors.::::::Gopalan Aqua has an abundance of amenities to live a satisfying lifestyle, ranging from a pool, fully equipped gymnasium, beautifully maintained parks, and jogging and strolling tracks. Multigenerational families will enjoy the multipurpose hall, children's play area, aerobics room, and even a library and business center. Sports buffs will find half a basketball court, cricket net practice, and a badminton court to cater to their sporting interests.::::::Locality::::::The place is very convenient, located beside the Government Polytechnic College and near several necessary services. Large hospitals like Manipal Hospital are within 3-4 km, providing access to healthcare. There are several malls and supermarkets within the campus, so shopping is convenient and easy.::::::The public transport facility is walking distance away, and there are a lot of choices available nearby. Additionally, establishments such as banks and ATMs are easily available nearby. For longer travelers, the Whitefield Railway Station is just 4 km from the property, and the Hope Farm Metro Station is just 1.3 km away.
